title: Document Registry Schema
description: Schema for BAMF ACTE Companion document registry that tracks documents, metadata, renders, and folder locations

schemaVersion.description: JSON Schema version used for validation (e.g., '1.0')

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last registry update (e.g., '2026-01-09T16:00:00Z')

DocumentEntry.description: A document entry in the registry with metadata and renders

caseId.description: Case ID this document belongs to (e.g., 'ACTE-2024-001')

folderId.description: Optional folder ID within the case (e.g., 'personal-data')

filePath.description: Relative file path from application root (e.g., 'public/documents/ACTE-2024-001/personal-data/Birth_Certificate.jpg')

uploadedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when document was uploaded

fileHash.description: SHA-256 file integrity hash in format 'sha256:hexdigest'

renders.description: Array of rendered versions (anonymized, translated, etc.)

RenderEntry.description: A rendered version of a document (anonymized or translated)

type.description: Type of render: 'anonymized' (PII removed) or 'translated' (language converted)

filePath.description: Relative file path to the rendered document

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when render was created

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for translated renders (e.g., 'en', 'de'). Required for type='translated'
